description_long: This obelisk is constructed from a dark, weathered stone and features a rectangular, slightly tapered shaft with a prominent, overhanging capstone. The front face is adorned with a series of engraved Egyptian-style hieroglyphs, including the Eye of Horus, and other symbolic motifs, arranged vertically along the sides and horizontally above a recessed central panel. The surface of the stone is visibly cracked and textured, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The capstone is thick and projects outward, creating a shadowed ledge above the inscriptions. The sides and rear are plain, with the rear lacking any decorative elements or engravings. The overall form is monumental and solid, evoking the style of ancient Egyptian commemorative monuments.
description: A dark, weathered stone obelisk with Egyptian-style hieroglyphs and a prominent overhanging capstone. The front features detailed engravings and a cracked, aged surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing engraved hieroglyphs, the Eye of Horus, and a cracked recessed panel beneath a projecting capstone.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the capstone and the plain, unadorned side surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain surface, lacking inscriptions or ornamentation, and visible stone texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the capstone's depth and the unembellished side.
attribute_inscription: Engraved Egyptian-style hieroglyphs, including the Eye of Horus, are present on the front face above and beside the recessed panel. The inscriptions are stylized, moderately legible, and appear to be decorative rather than functional text.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative carvings and motifs, primarily hieroglyphs and symbolic reliefs, are present on the front face. The rest of the obelisk is plain and undecorated.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and integrated with the shaft, slightly wider than the upper section, and features a cracked, weathered texture. There are no steps or additional platforms.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by a thick, overhanging capstone with a flat top and angular edges, lacking any additional decoration or unique features.
